case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. YOUNG, ROBERT C., AKA ROBERT YOUNG et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: DAVIS, MATTHEW DAVID SUBSTITUTED FOR KIMERLING, ALLYCE SUSAN AS ATTORNEY FOR HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, ROBERT C., AKA ROBERT YOUNG YOUNG, JEANNETTE MARIE AKA FITCH, JEANNETTE DOES I - X SUMMONS ISSUED
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS YOUNG, JEANNETTE MARIE AKA JEANETTE YOUNG TO BE YOUNG, JEANNETTE MARIE AKA FITCH, JEANNETTE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
